summary: Excellent soundboard recording that captures Jerry's joyous playing, even though only a single track of the show is available.
review: The reviewers rave about the performance, especially noting how Jerry’s final notes convey he was having a great time. The soundboard source provides clear audio and makes the lone track enjoyable despite the missing remainder of the concert.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are highly positive (4‑5 stars) and praise both the performance and the soundboard quality; no criticisms were noted, leading to a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific issues mentioned; reviewers imply clear, enjoyable audio from the soundboard source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Only one track is present, so flow cannot be assessed; however, the portion that exists is described as perfect and full of energy.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His last few notes are highlighted as evidence he was having a real good time.
